nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 米西奧內斯省 (阿根廷)
nodes.summary: 米西奧內斯省 (阿根廷)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联58种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Purple-winged ground dove、Long-trained nightjar等58种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 查科省
nodes.summary: 查科省（Chaco）為南美國家阿根廷二十三省之一，位於阿根廷北部，首府為雷西斯滕西亚（Resistencia）。 參考文獻

nodes.name: Olivaceous elaenia
nodes.summary: Olivaceous elaenia（Olivaceous elaenia，学名 Elaenia mesoleuca），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联12个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 阿根廷
nodes.summary: 阿根廷是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联495种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、北山䳍、南山䳍等495种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The olivaceous elaenia (Elaenia mesoleuca) is a species of bird in subfamily Elaeniinae of family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Argentina, Brazil, Paraguay, and Uruguay.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The olivaceous elaenia (Elaenia mesoleuca) is a species of bird in subfamily Elaeniinae of family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Argentina, Brazil, Paraguay, and Uruguay.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The olivaceous elaenia is found from southern Goiás and southern Bahia in eastern Brazil south through eastern Paraguay and into eastern Uruguay and northern Argentina's Formosa, Chaco, and Misiones provinces. Its first record in Uruguay did not come until 2000. The olivaceous elaenia inhabits interior, edges, and clearings of humid tropical forest and also gallery forest, secondary forest, and more open woodlands
